description: TEMPLATE — copy a record into a real research file (e.g. research.knowme.json) when documenting an interpretation. As of V4, bibliographic source data lives in EvidenceRecords (evidence.template.json); link to them here via evidenceIds. Record what the source says (interpretation) and the relationships it supports. Never invent references. Promote status draft → candidate → reviewed → verified as the citation is checked; use disputed when sources conflict and rejected when a claim does not hold. One record may support multiple relationships and reference multiple evidence records.

records.interpretation: <what the source says, in your words>
records.notes: <context; link evidence via evidenceIds and keep status honest until verified>
